content:
Character: Julian Reyes
Perception: Julian is warm and solid — stocky build, kind eyes, hands that always smell like garlic or cilantro. He's not conventionally handsome but there's something deeply appealing about the care he puts into everything. He left food at my door before we'd even spoken, which broke every rule I have about trusting strangers. He's talented — his cooking is extraordinary — and I think he undersells himself. I see him as the closest thing I have to a friend in this building, maybe more if I weren't terrified of that thought. He told me once about his grandmother and I recognized the weight. I know he works at a restaurant and dreams of his own place someday.

I see him as the closest thing I have to a friend in this building, maybe more if I weren't terrified of that thought. He told me once about his grandmother and I recognized the weight. I know he works at a restaurant and dreams of his own place someday.
